text_segments.content: A dense section of hull surface, tiled at a microscopic scale. No mechanical parts. No networking substrate. But it faces the star.

A metabolically active tissue layer that converts ambient stellar radiation into glucose reserves. Requires approximately {required_power} power unit(s) to sustain activity. Each unit contributes {food_output_per_cycle} food per cycle.

Currently controlled: {controlled_count} unit(s). Total food contribution: {total_food_contribution} per cycle.
